concerns.text: Tasks T007 (forgetting/decay mechanism) and T008 (memory consolidation/CREB mechanism) implement features NOT authorized in spec.md. Plan.md explicitly states these are 'future work' notes added to research.md, not current scope. This is scope creep beyond the defined FR/SC set.

Task T015 implements 'precise cue-driven retrieval validation logic to distinguish specialization from pattern matching (Turing review)' not present in spec.md requirements. This adds unverified functionality outside the specification without explicit FR/SC authorization.

Task T033 logs computational cost per agent count for infrastructure assessment, but this metric is not defined in spec.md or Constitution Principle VI's required metrics (specialization index, cue-retrieval efficiency). This is scope creep beyond the specification.

Task T030 incorrectly references FR-010 (error logging) for power-law fitting implementation. Power-law fitting should reference FR-004 (specialization index) or US-3, not FR-010 which is about error logging. This is a traceability misattribution.
